query:
SELECT r.name, r.code, COUNT(rp.permission_id) as permissions_count
FROM roles r
LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
WHERE r.code IN ('SUPER_ADMIN', 'ADMIN', 'HR_ADMIN', 'ACCOUNTANT', 'SUPERVISOR', 'GUARD')
GROUP BY r.id, r.name, r.code
ORDER BY r.id;
command:

FROM roles r
LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON r.id = rp.role_id
WHERE r.code IN ('SUPER_ADMIN', 'ADMIN', 'HR_ADMIN', 'ACCOUNTANT', 'SUPERVISOR', 'GUARD')
GROUP BY r.id, r.name, r.code
ORDER BY r.id;
